/usr/bin/ar qc libnative.a CMakeFiles/native.dir/geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/screen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/gpx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/platforms/linux/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/toolkits/x11/screen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/toolkits/x11/wnd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/toolkits/x11/app_wnd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/toolkits/x11/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/toolkits/x11/globals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/toolkits/x11/gpx_wnd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/toolkits/x11/gpx_img.cpp.o CMakeFiles/native.dir/toolkits/x11/img.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnative.a
